executionArgs.additionalInstruction: IMPORTANT SETUP: All tests for /deadlineos-v3.html must first click the DEMO button (id=demo-mode-btn) via JS: await page.evaluate("document.getElementById('demo-mode-btn').click()") before interacting with any app features. For tasks: use id=task-input (textarea), id=add-btn (button). Find task IDs via window.tasks array, then use data-testid=task-check-{id} for checkbox and data-testid=task-delete-{id} for delete. For AI analyze: click id=analyze_btn and read div id=ai-out. For API key overlay: click id=apikey-change-btn. For 404 test: navigate to /nonexistent-xyz.html directly. AI output renders immediately in test mode (no streaming delay).
